name: verified-algebra-workflow
new_string: - **Historical FTS recovery question reopened and resolved (2026-07-14).** The earlier `state-4.db` mine was incomplete because it treated tool-result prose as the archive boundary. The live profile `state.db` message 4051 contains the complete original generator in `write_file.arguments.content`; messages 4057–4058 preserve the successful physical-slot patch; message 4060 preserves the `6.1281124199e-6` run. The recovered lock now includes full `Q_star,J_u,J_d,r,s`. Structural verification passes at ~1e-15 and a fresh full rerun reproduces `6.1281124074e-6`. Keep the old `locked_jordan_data.json`/`extract_mixing` degeneracy findings separate: they concern a different reconstructed path and do not invalidate the recovered historical moment-map executable. Full receipts: `references/locked-historical-fts-fit-recovery-2026-07-14.md`.
old_string: - **state-4.db mine is DONE — the recovery question is CLOSED (2026-07-13).** Mined the 117 MB `state-4.db` end-to-end. Verdict, do NOT re-open: (1) shared-frame `Q` was NEVER checkpointed (DB says so verbatim) → irrecoverable; (2) `state_H_fast` / `hermes-verify-general-fts-state.py` (faithful complex-symmetric extraction) is unrecoverable (only name + diffs in archive); (3) `extract_mixing` in the DB = the live repo file, but it uses `eigh(H)` (CP-killing path), NOT the faithful left-singular-vector complex-symmetric extraction; (4) `locked_jordan_data.json` now EXISTS on disk but is a circular reconstruction (its `_meta` admits CKM magnitudes were hard-wired; live `extract_mixing` on it gives `fro=0.64`, `J_cp=-0.007`, angles 18°/77°/44° — nowhere near real CKM) and has no `J_ν,J_e`; (5) `final_locked_action.json` is the octonion-gravity action, a different artifact; (6) Stage H `h1_full_summary.json` files have CKM/PMNS angle summaries but no frame or `J` arrays. Net: to unblock Gate C you must RE-DERIVE from first principles — rebuild `state_H_fast` (complex-symmetric, left-singular-vector) AND re-run the `SO(7)` optimizer WITH `Q` checkpointed. Full map in `references/state4-db-mine-2026-07-13.md`.
